page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: LARC454 or LARC489E.

Formerly: LARC489E.

LARC461 People and the Environment (3 Credits)

Focus is placed on human and environmental interactions. Students

will look at both natural and built environments and how they influence human health and well-being. Many environmental settings will be examined. These include hospitals, public housing neighborhoods, school settings, retirement communities, transportation corridors and green spaces. We will also explore how racial and socio-economic factors affect living and working environmental conditions. Ultimately, students will be using this knowledge to create environments that support individuals, families and various community groups’ health and well-being.

Credit Only Granted for. LARC489K or LARC461.
